mentions.note: Up 15% YoY on shortage, dollar weakness, geopolitical uncertainty. Own gold, don't trade it.
Volatility matching 2011 peak (preceded 50% correction); RSI in mid-90s; broken multi-decade trendline at 2900; hit 5100 yesterday; technical setup suggests potential trend reversal or blowoff.
Down 16% since war began—contrarian buy at these prices; gold was confused/absentee during rally but fighting back.
No longer geopolitical hedge; holders now speculators like Bitcoin buyers; stay through 25% drawdown shake-out; then revert to insurance role.

Up 127% since end-2023 but trading like speculative asset not hedge; failed protection in March inflation crisis (−14% while S&P −8%); take profits; seasonal/cycle analysis warns of 2-3 month pullback.
